name: Pasta Salad with Currants, Olives and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1 Red onion, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain.
2. Rinse the pasta under cold water; drain well.
3. Transfer the pasta to a large bowl.
4. In a food processor, blend garlic and salt into a paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed.
5. Add parsley and mince it in the processor.
6. Blend in lemon juice, vinegar, curry powder, sugar, cumin, and pepper.
7. With the machine running, gradually add oil through the feed tube in a thin, steady stream.
8. Pour the dressing over the pasta.
9. Add onion, olives, currants, and pine nuts to the pasta and toss.
10. Season with additional pepper if desired.
11. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours (or up to 1 day ahead).
12. Garnish the salad with parsley sprigs and cherry tomatoes before serving.
